title: Argentina vs France (2022 World Cup Final) — 2nd half kickoff, 5 min
video_source_note: 5-minute clip trimmed from FIFA's official full-match YouTube upload (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RgqKdplLIk4), starting exactly at second-half kickoff (video t=3298s) so video time 0 = match-clock 45:00 with no piecewise sync needed.
